title: evodiopanax evodiifolius var. gracilis
intro: Evodiopanax evodiifolius var. gracilis, commonly known as 'Gracilis', is a plant species in the family Araliaceae. It is a type of herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its health benefits and therapeutic properties. The health benefits of Evodiopanax evodiifolius var. gracilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant contains bioactive constituents such as lignans, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective effects.

These constituents, including evodiamine, evodionine, and rutaecarpine, have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which can help to improve people's daily lives by reducing the risk of chronic diseases and promoting overall well-being. The roots are rich in lignans and sesquiterpenes, while the leaves contain flavonoids and alkaloids, including evodiamine and rutaecarpine. The stems of the plant are also used in traditional medicine and contain sesquiterpenes, such as evodietin and rutaecarpine.
